acceptance_criteria.name: deactivateActiveSeekerByID() API
acceptance_criteria.notes: Publicly accessible, correctly removes active seeker by ID, gracefully handles non-existent IDs

acceptance_criteria.name: activateInactiveSeekerAtHex() API
acceptance_criteria.notes: Publicly accessible, correctly activates and positions seeker, gracefully handles edge cases

acceptance_criteria.name: getActiveSeekersByMovingPlayer() API
acceptance_criteria.notes: Publicly accessible, correctly filters and returns active seeker IDs by player, returns empty vector for no seekers

regressions: NONE - All existing tests continue to pass
notes: All three new seeker missile APIs validated; all 187 tactical tests pass with no failures. APIs are ready for tactical UI integration.
